description: Recipe with unstated step timing but known target time — should distribute remaining time evenly
sourceText:
Chemex Recipe

30g medium-coarse ground coffee
500g water at 200°F

1. Bloom with 60g of water for 45 seconds
2. Pour in slow circles to 300g
3. Wait for water to drain a bit
4. Pour to 500g
5. Let it drain completely

Total brew time around 4 minutes.
